title: JSON: querying type hinted nested array
description:
### Company or project name
Monumental
### Describe what's wrong
Example:
```sql
CREATE TABLE test_json_hint (
data JSON(items Array(JSON(name String, value UInt32)))
) ENGINE = Memory;
CREATE TABLE test_no_hint (
data JSON
) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_json_hint VALUES ('{"items": [{"name": "a", "value": 100}, {"name": "b", "value": 200}]}');
INSERT INTO test_no_hint VALUES ('{"items": [{"name": "a", "value": 100}, {"name": "b", "value": 200}]}');
SELECT data.items[].name AS value FROM test_json_hint;
SELECT data.items[].name AS value FROM test_no_hint;
```
This returns (when running with `clickhouse-local`):
```sql
[NULL,NULL]
['a','b']
```
Which is unexpected, that the value becomes NULL because of the type hint. Querying `data.items.name` does return the data, which is unexpected to me.
### Does it reproduce on the most recent release?
Yes
### How to reproduce
```
$ clickhouse-local --version
ClickHouse local version 25.11.1.558.
```
### Expected behavior
_No response_
### Error message and/or stacktrace
_No response_
### Additional context
_No response_
bug_features_seed: SELECT ?value FROM (SELECT json_value(data, '$.items[*].name') AS value FROM test_json_hint_v2);
key_bug_features: Type hinting in JSON nested array causes NULL values
